framework.name: Trusted Agent Protocol (TAP)
framework.description: A signature-based authentication protocol that allows AI agents to identify themselves to merchants as trusted commerce entities. Uses time-bound, non-replayable signatures to prove agent legitimacy and intent. Positions Visa as a certificate authority for AI agent identity in commerce contexts.
framework.raw_quote: New specifications include details related to signatures that are specific to the merchant and purpose, and are time bound, cannot be replayed or relayed.
